title: Leiotulus kotschyi

intro: Leiotulus kotschyi, also known as Kotschy's corydalis, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Papaveraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities, which may aid in relieving pain and reducing inflammation.
